title: crataegus monogyna subsp. aegeica
intro: Crataegus monogyna subsp. aegeica is a subspecies of hawthorn tree, specifically a variety of hawthorn native to the Aegean region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to act as a vasodilator, which can help to lower blood pressure, and its potential to improve cardiovascular health by reducing inflammation and improving blood lipid profiles. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna subsp. aegeica include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and promote relaxation.
